form.label: AWS DDoS 탐지 및 가상 상점 분석
form.description: CloudFront 로그 기반 IP 트래픽, DDoS 의심 이벤트, 상품 클릭을 분석하는 발표용 대시보드입니다.

search.query: index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | stats count as total_requests
index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | stats dc(client_ip) as unique_ips

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | bin _time span=1m | stats count as requests by _time client_ip | where requests >= tonumber("$ddos_threshold$") | stats dc(client_ip) as suspicious_ips

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | timechart span=1m count by client_ip limit=10

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | bin _time span=1m | stats count as requests by _time client_ip | where requests >= tonumber("$ddos_threshold$") | timechart span=1m sum(requests) by client_ip limit=10

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | bin _time span=1m | stats count as requests by _time client_ip | where requests >= tonumber("$demo_threshold$") | timechart span=1m sum(requests) by client_ip limit=10

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) | stats count as requests by client_ip | sort - requests | head 20

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+(?<status>\d{3})" | where isnotnull(status) | stats count as requests by status | sort status

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" | rex field=_raw "^\S+\s+(?<client_ip>\S+)\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+\S+\s+(?<host>\S+)\s+(?<uri>\S+)" | where isnotnull(client_ip) AND isnotnull(uri) | bin _time span=1m | stats count as requests by _time client_ip uri | where requests >= tonumber("$demo_threshold$") | sort - requests | head 50

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" "/api/events/product-click" "product_name=" | rex field=_raw "product_name=(?<product_name>[^&\s\t]+)" | eval product_name=replace(urldecode(product_name), "\+", " ") | stats count as clicks by product_name | sort - clicks

index=aws earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ source="*cloudfront*" "/api/events/product-click" "product_name=" | rex field=_raw "product_name=(?<product_name>[^&\s\t]+)" | eval product_name=replace(urldecode(product_name), "\+", " ") | timechart span=1m count by product_name limit=10
